overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in wizard robes walking through a medieval stone corridor into a grand Gothic dining hall with floating candles and stained glass windows, then proceeding along the perimeter past dining tables with NPC students.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone entrance corridor with armor displays

events.description: character approaches and opens the large wooden doors at the end of the corridor
dramatic brightening as light floods in from the Great Hall behind the doors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor toward the large wooden doors

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls with Gothic architectural details
massive carved oak doors with iron hinges and intricate paneling
full suit of medieval plate armor on stone display pedestal
full suit of medieval plate armor on stone display pedestal
high vaulted ceiling with ribbed Gothic arches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit stone corridor with suits of armor flanking the path. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches massive wooden doors at the end, which begin to open to reveal bright light from beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

events.description: character enters the Great Hall from the corridor, revealing the vast interior
character continues walking straight down the central aisle between dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking down the center aisle between long dining tables filled with students eating and conversing

notable_agents.action: students seated at house tables eating and socializing
students seated at house tables engaged in conversation

entered.detail: hundreds of candles suspended magically in mid-air illuminating the hall
tall ornate stained glass windows with intricate designs at the far end
long wooden dining tables with green and gold table runners
long wooden dining tables with red and gold table runners
massive stone support pillars lining the hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast Gothic dining hall with sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows and hundreds of floating candles overhead. The hall is filled with long house tables where students are seated eating and chatting. The character proceeds down the central aisle toward the front platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: side aisle of dining hall with large windows and exit corridor

events.description: character turns right to walk along the side wall near the large windows
character approaches the dark exit archway at the far end of the side aisle

agents.ego_description: walking along the side perimeter near the windows, passing the head table and continuing toward the far archway

notable_agents.action: small group of students standing and conversing near the far tables

entered.detail: tall Gothic windows with diamond-patterned glass casting long shadows
dark oak wainscoting covering the lower walls
stone archway leading to a darker corridor at the hall's end
eagle-shaped golden lectern with an open book

segments.scene_description: The character turns to walk along the side aisle where bright morning light streams through tall windows, casting long shadows across the marble floor. The floating candles now appear to the right as the character passes a golden lectern and continues toward a dark stone archway exit at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit stone corridor into a luminous and expansive Gothic dining hall. It begins behind a character in wizard robes as they pass suits of armor, moving toward massive wooden doors that swing open to reveal a burst of bright light. As the character enters the vast hall, the scene expands to show sunlight streaming through stained glass windows and hundreds of floating candles hovering above students seated at long tables. The camera then shifts its trajectory, following the character away from the central aisle and along a side perimeter where morning light casts long shadows across the marble floor. Finally, the view glides past a golden lectern before turning toward a dark stone archway exit at the far end of the hall.
